name: PlayStation 3
description: Sony's HD home console platform, known for Blu-ray, PlayStation Network, cinematic first-party games, and late-generation technical showcases.

eras.title: Difficult Launch Era
eras.description: High price, complex hardware, Blu-ray positioning, and early first-party growing pains.

eras.title: First-Party Recovery Era
eras.description: Sony's studios and major third-party releases define the PS3's strongest identity.

eras.title: Cross-Generation Era
eras.description: Late releases overlap with PlayStation 4 while PS3 remains active for major cross-generation games.
